untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (ascending broadening wedge structure identification) and volume shape analysis (U-shaped vs dome-shaped volume curves) which cannot be expressed as simple indicator threshold conditions. Specific price targets based on pattern extremes (highest high, lowest low calculations over variable pattern length) and market regime-dependent volume shape detection are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core breakout mechanics: expanding range (higher highs and lower lows), heavy volume confirmation (volume > hvol_20), and breakout direction changes. However, the essential pattern recognition requirement and volume shape characterization cannot be fully translated. The signal is fundamentally about visual pattern identification which requires either custom pattern indicators or candlestick sequence analysis not supported by the current indicator library.
